title: phyllanthus retroflexus
intro: Phyllanthus retroflexus, also known as Phyllanthus niruri, is a tropical plant species belonging to the family Phyllanthaceae, commonly found in Southeast Asia and India. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Phyllanthus retroflexus include its ability to treat liver and kidney disorders, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of malaria. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or infusions, and is often used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
